# Reinvently

> Reinvently is an independent AI research organisation led by Ed Yau (https://uk.linkedin.com/in/edmond-yau).

Reinvently publishes original model benchmarks, engineering evaluations and UK-focused analysis of AI governance and adoption. Material findings are tied to a test run, an attributable source or clearly labelled editorial judgement.

## Start here

- [About Reinvently](https://reinvently.co.uk/about/)
- [Research and editorial standards](https://reinvently.co.uk/research-standards/)
- [The Ed-o-meter LLM leaderboard](https://reinvently.co.uk/tools/ed-o-meter/)
- [AI research and analysis](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/)

## Research areas

- [Model evaluation and AI engineering](https://reinvently.co.uk/topics/engineering-evaluation/)
- [UK AI governance](https://reinvently.co.uk/topics/uk-ai-governance/)
- [AI adoption and value](https://reinvently.co.uk/topics/ai-adoption-value/)

## Selected research

- [GSD, BMAD, OpenSpec, or GitHub Spec Kit: Choosing the Right AI Development Framework](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/ai-dev-workflow-frameworks-gsd-bmad-openspec-speckit/) — 30 May 2026
- [Claude's Memory and Dream Features Are a Breakthrough That Will Accelerate Your AI Adoption Programme](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/claude-memory-dream-enterprise-agents/) — 21 May 2026
- [GPT-5.5 and the Age of Autonomous Task Completion](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/gpt-5-5-autonomous-task-completion/) — 21 May 2026
- [UK AI Regulation Tightens: What the ICO Guidance and Parliament's Inquiry Mean for Employers](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/uk-ai-regulation-ico-employment-2026/) — 15 May 2026
- [The Enterprise AI Reality Check: Why 79% of Organisations Aren't Seeing ROI](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/enterprise-ai-adoption-reality-check-2026/) — 8 May 2026
- [UK Sovereign AI: What the Government's £500m Bet Means for Your Organisation](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/uk-sovereign-ai-programme/) — 29 April 2026
- [The A2A Protocol: Why AI Agent Interoperability Is the Next Big Enterprise Decision](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/ai-agent-interoperability-a2a-protocol/) — 22 April 2026
- [Global AI Adoption: How Different Countries Are Embracing Artificial Intelligence](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/global-ai-adoption-attitudes/) — 20 April 2026
- [Claude Mythos: Anthropic's Most Powerful Model Yet](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/claude-mythos-anthropic-opportunity-for-companies/) — 19 April 2026
- [The Top 10 UK Companies Leading on AI](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/top-10-uk-ai-companies/) — 13 April 2026
- [RAG vs GraphRAG: Which Retrieval Architecture Is Right for Your AI Application?](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/rag-vs-graphrag/) — 12 April 2026
- [Microsoft Copilot Studio vs Azure AI Foundry vs AWS Bedrock](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/copilot-studio-vs-azure-ai-foundry-vs-aws-bedrock/) — 5 April 2026
- [The UK's AI Skills Gap: Why Closing It Is One of the Biggest Opportunities of the Decade](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/uk-ai-skills-gap-education-opportunity/) — 14 March 2026
- [GitHub Copilot vs Claude Code vs Cursor](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/github-copilot-vs-claude-code-vs-cursor/) — 27 May 2026
- [Microsoft Foundry: A Deep Dive](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/microsoft-foundry-deep-dive/) — 18 February 2026
- [The UK's Public AI Infrastructure: Government Institutes Shaping the National AI Ecosystem](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/uk-government-ai-institutes/) — 10 February 2026
- [Generative AI Adoption by Industry: Use Cases, Data and What Comes Next](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/generative-ai-adoption-by-industry/) — 22 January 2026
- [The Rise of AI in Web Development](https://reinvently.co.uk/blog/the-rise-of-ai-in-web-development/) — 12 November 2025
